nodes.label: 3-Tier User Role System
nodes.rationale: super_admin = SaaS product admin with cross-shop access, manually assigned (no self-signup). owner = shop owner, default role on every new signup, auto-gets own shop, full access including staff mgmt. staff = employee added by owner, billing-only (no staff mgmt).

nodes.label: Super Admin Role
nodes.rationale: SaaS product admin with cross-shop access to all shops' data. Manual-only assignment — no self-signup path exists, to avoid security risk.

nodes.label: Owner Role
nodes.rationale: Shop owner — default role on every new signup. Auto-creates own shop via DB trigger. Full access: categories, products, billing, settings, reports, staff mgmt scoped to own shop.

nodes.label: Staff Role
nodes.rationale: Employee added by owner via SignUpRequested(role:'staff', shopId). Billing-only (scan->sell->print), can view products & stock; no staff management access.

nodes.label: handle_new_user DB Trigger
nodes.rationale: DB trigger that fires on new user signup: auto-assigns 'owner' role + auto-creates the user's shop + links shop_id. Ensures self-signup always yields an owner; avoids Dart-side duplicate insert conflicts (idempotent).

nodes.label: Row Level Security (RLS) Policies
nodes.rationale: RLS policies scope data access by shop context. is_super_admin() helper bolts cross-shop bypass onto ALL tables so the SaaS admin can view/edit everything.

nodes.label: Supabase Backend
nodes.rationale: Cloud PostgreSQL + Realtime backend. Required for real-time multi-user sync. Handles Auth, Realtime, and storage.

nodes.label: Real-time Sync
nodes.rationale: Real-time inventory updates — when staff A sells, staff B sees updated stock instantly. Multi-user (4-5 staff + owner) support.

nodes.label: Billing (Point of Sale)
nodes.rationale: Multi-product bills, barcode/QR scan to cart, manual discount (INR or %), grand total override, thermal receipt print, UPI QR payment.

nodes.label: Product Inventory
nodes.rationale: Add products via QR/barcode scan, in-app QR generation, product fields (name, category, price, stock, location, barcode/qr, image), edit/delete, search/filter.

nodes.label: Dynamic Categories
nodes.rationale: Client can create/edit/delete categories; products organized category-wise; category management screen.

nodes.label: Staff Management (Owner-only)
nodes.rationale: Owner creates staff accounts (Supabase Auth signUp + shop_id link), list view scoped by RLS, delete staff. Staff hidden from non-owner (drawer, dashboard tile, add page guard). Edit & active/inactive toggle deferred.

nodes.label: Reports & History
nodes.rationale: Bill/invoice history, daily sales summary, low stock alerts, stock movement log (domain + data + UI complete).

nodes.label: QR Code Generator
nodes.rationale: In-app QR generator for products; product ID/data encoded in QR; print QR or save image. pretty_qr_code library.

nodes.label: Shelf / Location Tracking
nodes.rationale: Products assigned to box/shelf/rack location with description (e.g. 'Rack 3, Shelf B, Box 2') to help staff find products quickly.

nodes.label: Migration 006_three_tier_roles.sql
nodes.rationale: Extended profiles.role CHECK to 3 values; added is_super_admin() SECURITY DEFINER helper; rewrote handle_new_user() trigger to auto-create owner+shop; bolted super_admin RLS bypass onto all tables.

nodes.label: UserRole Dart Enum
nodes.rationale: enum UserRole { superAdmin, owner, staff } with fromString(); User getters userRole/isSuperAdmin/isOwner/isStaff. Type-safe role checks, backwards compatible.

nodes.label: Signup Default = Owner
nodes.rationale: SignUpParams/SignUpRequested/AuthRepository.signUp default role='owner'; auth_repository_impl lets DB trigger create owner+shop; only staff-by-owner passes role:'staff' best-effort. signUp sends {name, shop_name} so trigger can name shop.

nodes.label: Migration 005_add_staff_phone.sql
nodes.rationale: ALTER TABLE profiles ADD COLUMN phone TEXT (nullable). No new RLS needed — migration 003 already scopes owner/staff read + owner write on profiles.

nodes.label: Staff Feature (Clean Arch)
nodes.rationale: Staff feature mirrors Category feature: staff_repository, staff_usecases (GetStaffMembers, DeleteStaffMember), staff_repository_impl (profiles SELECT/DELETE via UserModel.fromProfileJson), staff_bloc/event/state, staff_list_page (owner-only FAB + delete dialog), add_staff_page (SignUpRequested role:'staff', shopId).

nodes.label: Owner-only Gating (3 Layers)
nodes.rationale: Staff hidden via: (1) Drawer/Dashboard hide, (2) add page BlocBuilder guard, (3) RLS rejects foreign shop_id. Defense-in-depth.

nodes.label: Session: Multi-Tenant Shop Data Isolation FIX
nodes.norm_label: session: multi-tenant shop data isolation fix

nodes.label: Migration 004_shop_data_scoping.sql
nodes.rationale: Added shop_id UUID + FK to products, categories, bills, bill_items, inventory_log (ON DELETE CASCADE) + indexes. Helpers user_shop_id(), belongs_to_shop(). Rewrote RLS with belongs_to_shop scoping; dropped open policies.

nodes.label: shop_id Dart Threading
nodes.rationale: product/category/report repositories .eq('shop_id', shopId); blocs injected authBloc to read _currentShopId; String? shopId optional end-to-end so null falls back to RLS. Defense-in-depth (DB + app both scope).

nodes.label: Dart-Only Fix Preference
nodes.rationale: CLAUDE.md instruction — fix in Dart (UI/BLoC/repos) before touching DB; avoid SQL migrations unless schema must change. Email verification gate hardened Dart-only.

nodes.label: RealtimeService
nodes.rationale: Generic subscribeToTable() using onPostgresChanges; subscribeToProducts() combines INSERT/UPDATE/DELETE in one callback with event_type; tracks channels; channel name public:products.

nodes.label: Stock Validation Before Bill
nodes.rationale: ValidateStockBeforeBill dispatches SubmitBillEvent after passing; SubmitBillEvent also validates (defense-in-depth). Stock checked from Supabase live (not cached) to avoid race conditions. Print receipt NOT blocked by stock check.

nodes.label: ReportBloc Global Provider Fix
nodes.rationale: ReportBloc was only provided under Dashboard -> /reports/* pages crashed with ProviderNotFoundException. Moved to main.dart MultiBlocProvider; removed duplicate local provider in DashboardPage.

nodes.label: Phase 0 — Foundation
nodes.rationale: Flutter setup, Hive+get_it+go_router+theme, Clean Architecture, GitHub repo, project docs, Graphify, Supabase client config.

nodes.label: Phase 1 — Database & Auth
nodes.rationale: Supabase tables (categories, products, profiles, bills, bill_items, locations, inventory_log), RLS, Auth (email + Google OAuth), auth screens, role-based access.

nodes.label: Phase 2 — Core Features
nodes.rationale: Categories CRUD, Products (QR scan add, QR gen, location, stock), Billing (multi-product, discount, total override, save, thermal print, UPI QR, scanner->cart).

nodes.label: Phase 3 — Real-time & Multi-user
nodes.rationale: Supabase Realtime subscriptions on products; live inventory sync across staff; multi-staff concurrent billing with stock validation.

nodes.label: Phase 4 — Reports & History
nodes.rationale: Bill history, daily sales, low stock alerts, stock movement log.

nodes.label: Phase 4.5 — Dashboard & Navigation UX
nodes.rationale: Dashboard at /, scanner moved to /scan, reusable widgets (StatCard, DashboardActionCard, QuickActionTile), improved AppDrawer with logout.

nodes.label: Phase 5 — Polish & Deploy
nodes.rationale: Google Drive backup (pending), testing/bug fixes, APK build (KGP warning pending fix), Play Store (optional).

nodes.label: Phase 6 — SaaS-Ready Auth (Owner Signup + Shops)
nodes.rationale: shops table + RLS (003_saas_shops.sql), profiles.shop_id column, profiles RLS shop-context, owner signup flow (shop create + role='owner' + shop_id link), User.shopId. Super Admin portal DEFERRED.

nodes.label: Phase 6.5 — Staff Management (Owner-only)
nodes.rationale: Migration 005_add_staff_phone.sql, User/UserModel phone field, signUp shopId threading, Staff feature (Clean Arch mirrors Category), wiring /staff route + owner-only drawer + dashboard tile. NOTE: delete removes profiles row only; auth.users may stay orphaned.

nodes.label: Migration 003_saas_shops.sql
nodes.rationale: shops table + RLS (owner CRUD own shop); profiles.shop_id column; profiles RLS shop-context read (owner sees all, staff sees own shop). Also already scopes owner/staff read + owner write on profiles (reused by 005).

nodes.label: Kotlin Gradle Plugin Warning
nodes.rationale: app_settings, device_info_plus, mobile_scanner, print_bluetooth_thermal, share_plus apply KGP; future Flutter build break. flutter pub upgrade partial; full Built-in Kotlin migration pending rebuild verification.

nodes.label: Code Quality Rules
nodes.rationale: Follow Clean Architecture; BLoC for all state, no setState for complex; equatable for state/event; run build_runner after @JsonSerializable changes; widget tests for critical flows

nodes.label: Git Rules
nodes.rationale: main branch stable/deployable; feature/<feature-name> branches; imperative commit messages

nodes.label: Naming Conventions
nodes.rationale: snake_case.dart files; PascalCase classes; camelCase vars/functions; XxxBloc/Event/State; /kebab-case routes

nodes.label: State Management Rules
nodes.rationale: Immutable events (freezed/equatable); Blocs emit only via emit(); handle loading states in UI

nodes.label: Database Rules
nodes.rationale: Hive ops on main isolate; migrations via Hive TypeAdapter version bumps

nodes.label: Project Rules
nodes.rationale: Flutter SDK >=3.1.0 <4.0.0; Material 3; theme colors via AppTheme, no hardcoded colors

nodes.label: Update Rule (Electricity)
nodes.rationale: Har file edit baad: memory.md update, graphify update, RPD/phases/architecture/design update, CLAUDE.md if config change; multiple files har file baad update

nodes.label: Parallel Work Rule
nodes.rationale: Har kaam multiple subagents mein baant kar parallel karo; time limited hai, jitna parallel utna jaldi complete

nodes.label: Graphify Rules
nodes.rationale: Run /graphify --update after significant code changes; KG lives in graphify-out/
